chain.thought: Explanation: Counted the records set outside the United States for each athlete. Livio Berruti had two records in Rome, Italy, while Bobby Morrow, Manfred Germar, Peter Radford, Tommie Smith, and Donald Quarrie each had one. Therefore, Livio Berruti set the most records in a country other than the United States.

judge_thought:
Explanation: Count records set outside the United States by each athlete using the "location of race" column:
- Bobby Morrow: Melbourne, Australia (1)
- Manfred Germar: Wuppertal, Germany (1)
- Peter Radford: Wolverhampton, United Kingdom (1)
- Livio Berruti: Rome, Italy (2) — rows 11 and 12
- Tommie Smith: Mexico City, Mexico (1)
- Donald Quarrie: Cali, Colombia (1)
All others are in the United States. Livio Berruti has the most with 2 records outside the United States.
